name: daily-games-hub
description: A hub for groups of friends to compete in daily games

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run db:setup --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npx --prefix server prisma generate --schema server/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run build --prefix client && npm run db:migrate --prefix server
